text:
A young girl walked into her house late one evening.

There was an ancient-looking book that sat oddly on her bedroom dresser. She’d read about it in an old folklore book club monthly pamphlet. Something strange about it fascinated her. She decided to read it.

As she flipped through the pages she discovered magical tales. The illustrations sparkled strange colors. It’s probably not worth my time…

The stories changed though. People came back. Animals transformed. She felt... something inside stir. Maybe it’s good... I’d go check some things out if I could.

She put the book away for a few nights. A week crawled past. Night again. She couldn’t sleep.

She plopped onto the couch.

I should see what it’s talking about. I’ve done bad stuff.

Somehow she couldn’t think. Just thoughts. Thoughts about things she’d been suppressing... that girl stuff.

It’s not worth it anymore.

She tossed the book on the floor. Her bedroom.
